title: Diagram polish pass: confetti blending, arrow fixes, layout, footer placement
description: Multi-item polish pass from session 7: (1) confetti multiplicative blending + 50% opacity + bigger dots, (2) SVG logos in tl;dr boxes, (3) session-workflow figure compression + arrow fixes + remove yellow pill, (4) center non-overflow figures, (5) multi-agent scaling + text color + pills + daemon + bottom block, (6) design-workflow straight arrows + styling + monospace commands, (7) no dashed lines anywhere, (8) footer below quarto next-page nav

comments.author: maxine--basel
comments.content: Committed: style(docs): diagram polish — bigger confetti, solid arrows, icons in tl;dr, footer below nav [CL-187] | Files: 26 files changed, 358 insertions(+), 256 deletions(-)
